title: Mickey, Minnie, and Mole's Galactic Bake-Off
summary: Mickey, Minnie, and their hungry friend Mole set out to bake blueberry and banana treats, but their quest for ingredients takes them from a messy grocery store run to the far reaches of the galaxy. Aided by Jickity Jickity Giraffe and his fast race car, the trio eventually boards a spaceship to visit Mischief Mouse, the King of a royal castle orbiting Jupiter. After navigating past a giant sentient space rock, they deliver a glowing gift to the King before returning home to Earth for a well-earned rest.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh good. Okay, you got your flashlight on.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Actually, we could just do Minnie, Mickey, and Mole.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: No mischief this time? You know, all of their names start with the same letter. Do you know what letter they start with? What letter is it? Like M-M-Mickey, M-M-Minnie, M-M-Mole. What letter is that? M-m-m...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: M!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: It's M! Well, Mickey and Minnie and Mole were picking blueberries one day. And each of them had their own basket. Mickey had a basket of blueberries and Minnie had a basket and Mole had a basket. And pretty soon Mickey and Minnie had mostly filled up their baskets. But Mole's was empty. And also everyone noticed that Mole had a lot of blue and purple juice smeared all over his face. What happened?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: He ate!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: He ate the blueberries! And Mickey and Minnie said, "Hey Mole, you done picking blueberries yet?" And what did Mole say?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I ate the blueberries! I ate the blueberries!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, you ate all of yours? said Mickey. Well, I was picking mine to save some for later. And Minnie said, "Yeah, me too. I think maybe we could bake something with blueberries in it."

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Blueberry muffins!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Mickey said, "Oh yeah, blueberry muffins, that could be delicious. But Mole, how are you gonna make yours if you don't have any? Unless we share."

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Maybe if Mole makes banana muffins, then Mickey and Minnie could make blueberry muffins.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Huh, what a good solution, said Minnie Mouse. "But where are we gonna get bananas?" And Mole said, "Oh, I know." What did Mole say?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: The grocery store!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, let's go to the grocery store, said Mole. And Mickey and Minnie said, "Okay, we can go there. But none of us knows how to drive a car, so we can't get there. Who could we ask for help to get us to the grocery store?" Who's a friend of theirs that has a car that could drive them?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I know. Dad, could I have Jane and... Oh, I know. It's Jickity Jickity the Giraffe.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Wait, is it Jickity Jickity the Giraffe or Jickity Jickity Jickity the Giraffe?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Jickity Jickity Giraffe. And he has a car, a race car, and it races you all the way to the store.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Mickey and Minnie and Mole were so excited to hop in Jickity Jickity Giraffe's race car and they all zoomed to the store so fast. Zoom! And then, errrt! That squealing sound is when we pressed on the brakes and the tires squeak against the ground because the car is stopping and they went errrt! And they stopped in the parking lot of the grocery store. And Jickity Jickity Giraffe said, "Here we are. We made it in record time, so fast because we went in my race car." And Mickey and Minnie and Mole said, "Oh thanks!" and they hopped out and they ran into the grocery store. What'd they do in there?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Bought bananas.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: They bought some bananas, but then whoops! Mickey Mouse tripped over something and fell right on the floor. What did he trip on?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Keep telling the story and then you'll find out.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, they had dropped a banana while they were shopping for bananas and Mickey tripped on the squishy slippery banana and then splat! He fell right into the display full of... what did he fall into?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Keep telling the story and then you'll find out.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A giant basket of raspberries! Splurt! And so all the raspberries went squish all onto Mickey Mouse's fur. And he said, "Oh no, now I'm all red." And Mole said, "That's okay, I'm all purple from eating the blueberries."

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Mickey, you could take a bath!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: said Minnie Mouse. "You could take a bath when we get home." Okay. And then Mole says, "I hope Jickity Jickity's waiting out there to drive us home with his race car." But then they looked outside and they saw someone very tall sitting in his car in the parking lot. It was Jickity Jickity Giraffe. So they went to the cashier and they bought the bananas for Mole's banana bread. They also bought the raspberries because they felt bad that they had squished them. And then they hopped back in the race car and zoomed right back to whose house did they go to?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Mickey's house.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: To Mickey's. And then Mickey said, "Excuse me, Minnie Mouse, could you um open up that recipe book and get our blueberry muffin recipe out?" And Mickey said, "Okay," and he read the recipe. Now Isabella, what was step one of the recipe?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Mix all of the ingredients and then mix it tight. And then you bake it. And then you have to... and then... and then you have to put the blueberries in it so it tastes yummy.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Hmm, that's a simple recipe. And so they mixed everything up and they put it in the oven to bake and then bake bake bake bake bake. Ding! It was done and they took it out and then they put the blueberries on? And then oh, it was still too hot to eat. They couldn't eat them so they had to blow on them. And then they got nice and cool and then they took a nibble. Yum! They were delicious. But Mole said, "Okay, now it's my turn. Here, I found a cookbook with a nice banana bread recipe. Will you read me the recipe? What's step one of that one?"

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Mix the ingredients, then mix it tight. Then add the flavors. Then you have to put the bananas in it and then you have to bake it in the oven and then you have to eat it all up.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yum! And so they baked their banana bread and they ate it all up. Well, Mickey said to Minnie and Mole, "Hey, now that we've had our delicious blueberry muffins and banana bread, do you want to go take a trip on our little spaceship?" And what did Mole say?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yes, let's go!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Mole said, "Yes, yes, yes! I would love to go to space." And Mickey said, "Do you think you'd like to visit um the moon, or um Jupiter? Or we could go to the sun, or an asteroid. What do you think you'd like to go visit?"

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Or... or a royal castle. I pick the royal castle of Mischief Mouse the King.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The Royal Castle of Mischief Mouse the King? But is it in outer space somewhere?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yes, it's in outer space, very close to Jupiter. You have to fly fly fly in your rocket until you get to Jupiter the planet. It's right there, you'll see a royal castle.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Minnie said, "You know, I think at Mischief Mouse's royal castle um we should bring a present with us to deliver when we get there. What do you think that they need living in that royal castle all the way at Jupiter?"

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Look, my hand is orange. Look.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, that's cool. Do you think that they would like to have a flashlight? Maybe Mischief Mouse doesn't have a flashlight and would like one as a present. Should we bring one in our spaceship?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yes, we should.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so Mickey said, "Oh, here's one!" And he got the flashlight and he brought it on the spaceship. And Mickey and Minnie and Mole climbed on the spaceship and then they did their countdown. What number did the countdown start at?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Three.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, we'll start the countdown at three, said Mickey. "Let's all count together."

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Three...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Two...

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: One...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Blast off!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then, whoosh! Their little spaceship flew up into the sky and it went higher and higher and higher. They were up above the clouds and they could look down at Planet Earth. And then they arrived in the orbit of the giant planet Jupiter, which was a big swirling purple planet.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Do you see the big royal castle?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Mickey Mouse went to the cockpit of the spaceship where there was a big window. We gotta find the castle. And as they got closer they saw that it was a big rock, but it had eyes and a mouth.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, mischief is not a rock.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well no, 'cause it wasn't Mischief, it was someone else. It was the floating space rock. And they said, "Oh, hello space rock." And what did the rock say?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I'm big!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: You're big? Oh yeah, you are big. Could you help us find the way to Mischief's Royal Castle?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: You can't help us? Oh, that's too bad. And so finally, Mickey and Minnie and Mole flew their spaceship over to a very round purple rock that on top of it sticking out was a beautiful stone building with tall turrets.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Dad, are we doing short or long enough?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: This is gonna be long now because it's nighttime. And through that window, you know who they could see?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It was Mischief Mouse.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: It was Mischief Mouse! And they walked up to the door and they pressed the doorbell. What song did it play?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Ba-na-na-na-ba-na-na-na-na!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: So they pressed the button and it went "Ba-na-na-na-ba-na-na-na-na!" And Mischief Mouse said, "Wow! What a surprise! It's my friends Mickey and Minnie, and what's your name?" And what did the Mole say?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Histopande Graphis Tulit Hamdem.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Mole said, "My name's Histopande Graphis Tulit Hamdem." And Mischief Mouse said, "Oh, that's a very long name. Can I call you something for short, Mole?"

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Actually, Pistastantins.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Pistastantins? Mole said, "You can call me Pistastantins for short." And they gave him the special flashlight and everyone decided to go back home. The end.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Now let's do a book.

characters.name: Mickey
characters.description: One of Mistress Mouse’s storied stuffy mice, this famous plush adventurer is a visionary benefactor who manifests fragrant blooms from magic Legos and pilots his Mousecar through lightless depths. Whether arming moles for Kitty’s investigations or securing solutions for Frasgle, he remains fiercely loyal to Minnie, Mole, Izzy, and Hattie. Accompanied by a cheerful infant and shadowed by a friend’s disappearance, his haste to reach the spires of Peacock’s castle has left him without essential provisions, miring him in a sudden, hungry peril.

characters.name: Minnie
characters.description: A wise veteran of briny depths and interstellar frontiers, Mickey’s resourceful mouse companion and confidant to the Princess of Mouseland guides Izzy and Hattie with a glowing lantern and ingenious Mystery Mousketools. Having recently breathed life into a towering guardian of interlocking bricks, this intrepid traveler now points the way toward the mountain’s peak, pausing to investigate the savory aroma of bacon-scented mushrooms while serving as a compassionate friend whose seasoned instincts help decipher Frasgle’s complex roars and sounds.

characters.name: Mole
characters.description: A resourceful, perpetually humming mole with an impossibly long name, this polite and intrepid mariner serves as a bridge between worlds, translating Frasgle’s unique tongue and guiding the way to the hidden Underground Library. Whether managing rocket controls with wide-eyed curiosity, unraveling treehouse mysteries, or sharing the magic of special Legos, he encourages his companions to embrace the unknown between tending his dandelion yard and baking fragrant banana bread. A lover of both wriggly worms and sweet blueberries, he sings whimsical songs of carnabee sharks and drives a noisy dark brown car, remaining firmly hesitant about boarding giant robots even as he coaxes his friends toward bold new adventures.

characters.name: Jickity Jickity Giraffe
characters.description: A very tall giraffe who drives a high-speed race car.

characters.name: Mischief Mouse
characters.description: Reigning from a purple-striped Jovian castle, this affable mouse King—a playful-named companion to Pinecone Mouse—is a seasoned adventurer, guardian of the Underground Library, and Hattie’s steadfast ally. Between savoring artisanal cheeses and awaiting a rugged cardboard replacement for his fragile Lego hat, he spends leisure hours meticulously constructing and gleefully smashing soaring towers. A pancake-loving monarch who once tended shop for mountain-dwelling traffic cones, his cosmic quests recently shifted from the stars to the speedway; having borrowed a tow truck from Mistress Mouse, he proved a formidable competitor who nearly clinched a stunning victory. Whether piloting starships or joining the group’s latest trek to Nana’s house, he remains a vigilant protector and devoted friend across the galaxy.

characters.name: Space Rock
characters.description: A giant, sentient floating rock in space with eyes and a mouth.

places.name: Blueberry Patch
places.description: The field where the friends pick berries to fill their baskets.

places.name: Grocery Store
places.description: A distant neighborhood shop stocked with soda, crisp celery, and jewel-toned pomegranates, forever etched in the trio’s memory for the bananas they gathered and the messy remains of squished raspberries. It remains a whimsical local sanctuary where, amidst the nostalgia, even the resident mice can be found purchasing small bowls of hearty vegetable soup.

places.name: Mickey's House
places.description: Where the friends bake their muffins and bread.

places.name: Jupiter
places.description: A massive, swirling sphere of deep purple gas looms in the void, dominated by the cyclonic fury of a Great Red Spot. Its churning amethyst atmosphere hides a crushing gravitational pull that asserts total dominance over the surrounding reaches of space.

places.name: Royal Castle
places.description: A stone building with tall turrets located on a purple rock near Jupiter.
